role_summary: the aml / kyc specialist ensures compliance with anti -money laundering and know -your- customer regulations.
responsibilities: • conduct customer due diligence and kyc reviews   • monitor transactions for aml red flags   • investigate suspicious transactions and  activities   • file regulatory reports (str, ctr)   • ensure compliance with rbi and aml regulations   • support aml audits and regulatory inspections
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant   • knowledge of aml / kyc laws and frameworks   • strong analytical  and investigative skills         banking & financial services roles
